name: Dungeon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the butter and both sugars until smooth.
3. Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add the flour, salt, and baking soda, stirring until combined.
5. Mix in the oats and raisins.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9" x 13-inch baking pan.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into bars.
